reviews.comment:
La nafta de esa estación me arruinó el auto.  Una locura.  Tengo mucha bronca. Me mudé cerca y empecé a cargar solo ahí y me destruyo el auto. No carguen

(Translated by Google)
The gas at that station ruined my car. It's crazy. I'm so angry. I moved nearby and started filling up only there, and it destroyed my car. Don't fill up there.
